name: io.github.executeautomation/playwright-mcp-server
description: MCP server for browser automation with Playwright — navigate, interact, and test web applications

tools.name: playwright_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL in the browser

tools.name: playwright_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page

tools.name: playwright_click
tools.description: Click an element on the page using a selector

tools.name: playwright_fill
tools.description: Fill in a form input field

tools.name: playwright_evaluate
tools.description: Execute JavaScript code in the browser
